use_cases: Triggering form submissions with different visual emphasis
Providing destructive action options with warning styling
Implementing link-style buttons within text content
ai_summary: A reusable React Button component with class-variance-authority (CVA) providing multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, TypeScript support, and Tailwind CSS styling. Includes focus-visible states, disabled states, and ring-offset accessibility features. This atomic component serves as a foundational UI element for triggering actions across any application context.
